mapper.select: select * from visit_daily where visit_date >= to_date(#{month},'YYYY-MM') and visit_date < add_months(to_date(#{month},'YYYY-MM'),1) order by visit_date desc

select to_char(visit_date, 'YYYY-MM') as visit_date, sum(visit_count) as visit_count, sum(visit_login) as visit_login from visit_daily where visit_date >= to_date(#{year}, 'YYYY') and visit_date < add_months(to_date(#{year}, 'YYYY'), 12) group by to_char(visit_date, 'YYYY-MM') order by visit_date desc

select use_date as useDate, sum(case when use_type = 'tournament_list' then use_count else 0 end) as tournamentList, sum(case when use_type = 'tournament_detail' then use_count else 0 end) as tournamentDetail, sum(case when use_type = 'streamer_list' then use_count else 0 end) as streamerList, sum(case when use_type = 'streamer_detail' then use_count else 0 end) as streamerDetail, sum(case when use_type = 'ck_streamer' then use_count else 0 end) as ckStreamer, sum(case when use_type = 'ck_list' then use_count else 0 end) as ckList from visit_use where use_date >= to_date(#{month},'YYYY-MM') and use_date < add_months(to_date(#{month},'YYYY-MM'),1) group by use_date order by use_date asc

select to_char(use_date, 'YYYY-MM') as useDate, sum(case when use_type = 'tournament_list' then use_count else 0 end) as tournamentList, sum(case when use_type = 'tournament_detail' then use_count else 0 end) as tournamentDetail, sum(case when use_type = 'streamer_list' then use_count else 0 end) as streamerList, sum(case when use_type = 'streamer_detail' then use_count else 0 end) as streamerDetail, sum(case when use_type = 'ck_streamer' then use_count else 0 end) as ckStreamer, sum(case when use_type = 'ck_list' then use_count else 0 end) as ckList from visit_use where use_date >= to_date(#{year}, 'YYYY') and use_date < add_months(to_date(#{year}, 'YYYY'), 12) group by to_char(use_date, 'YYYY-MM') order by useDate asc
